author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Fixed all ~30 GPU crash sites in ferrotorch-vision. Replaced .data() with .data_vec() for GPU-safe reads, and restored device on all TensorStorage::cpu() outputs via .to(device). Fixed files: vit.rs, swin.rs, convnext.rs, unet.rs, to_tensor.rs, resize.rs, center_crop.rs, io.rs. All 180 tests pass.
